sub_topics.title: Bintu bitulamata (Kwingijisha bizhima kutama)
competences: Kwingijisha mulaka wafikilamo bulongo pa kwisamba pa bintu bitulamata (Kwingijisha bizhima kutama)

instructional_blocks.hook: Juuba jimo mwanyike umo waimene kuya ku kusuulu Byo afikile mu sukulu wataine bakwabo balama tumabotolo twamwekelenga nobe twa Mojo mu maboko. Pakumona oa mabotolo wakomokele ne kulomba bakwabo kumupapo. Bamubujile amba kechi basa kumupela apo ine, kana ku kibanza kwafyamika bulongo.
teacher_steps: Buule bafunda kwisamba pa kwingijisha bizhima kutama
Pane mitwe ya kwisambapo yaamba pa kwingijisha bizhima kutama
Bike bafunda mu bipanyi pakuuba amba besambe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Mu kino kibese kya Kuteleka ne Kwamba, bafunda basakuyuka butame ne buyuke bwa kwingijisha bizhima.

teacher_steps: Apane mwingilo ku bafunda wa kwingijisha byambo bimo byasalwa mu bipelu
learner_steps: Balondele bulongo mabulañano akibaaba kufuma mu mabuuku mo basakutana byambo
Balumbulule bulongo byambo bimo byasalwa kufuma mu kibaba
Bafunda bapane ndumbulwilo ya kulumbulula ku bakwabo
Bobe mwingilo wa kwingijisha byambo bimo byasalwa mu bipelu
Balenge bipelu na byambo byafikilamo bulongo
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Bafunda bapane mikumbu ya byambo byo balumbulula ne kwingijisha byambo byasalwa mu bipelu.

sub_topics.short_notes: Bizhima ni bintu byo busuntu bulolomo butuba muya mu mubili. Bizhima bino bipotekamo mu mubili ukumo ukukwata. Kabiji bimwi bizhima kechi byamona mu menso ne, ine bulanguluka ne masumba akululaka mu byenji byapusana-pusana.

vocabulary.definition: Bintu byo busuntu bulolomo butuba muya mu mubili
Kufwayila bintu bikele pa kuya bya bulongo
Kyubilo kya kuuba bintu bifuma byo bena kufwayila
Tulongolo tucheche tubula kumweka twa mu mashi
Masongola

questions: Sambilamo pa nshila ya kwisambilamo bizhima
Mu ñanyi mashinda kwingijisha bizhima kutama mo kuletela makatazho?
Mashinda ka owalanguluka akonsha kukwasha kushinjilamo kwingijisha bizhima kutama?
Bañanyi bo walanguluka bengijisha bingi bizhima kutama mu kino kyalo kya Zambia?

sub_topics.title: Kutanga Nchikameno
competences: Bafunda batange ne kumvwisha bulongo bibaaba muji bya mu mabuuku byapusana-pusana

teacher_steps: Bafunda batange bibaaba muji bya mu mabuuku byapusana-pusana
Bibaba nabiji mashimikila, bishimi, nsansawilo, nsapawilo, yimbo ya kumuzhi ne bikwabotu
Mufunjishi apane mepuzho ku bafunda
learner_steps: Bakumbule bulongo mepuzho apusana-pusana pa kibaaba
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Makatazho onse atendekele panyuma ya myaka ibiji yapitapo, po natendekejile kwingijisha bizhima. Kwajinga ne mwanamukazhi umo wapwishishe myaka makumi abiji ne itanu mukaleya na mambo kwitwezha mu busulu bwa kusulwisha bizhima.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kutanga bibaaba bikwasha bafunda kumvwisha ne kwipisha bibaba byakutangiwa.

questions: Busulu ka bwitwezhezhemo mwanamulume uji mu jishimikila?
Mu milanguluko yobe, uno mutwe ubena kwamba pa ka?
Ñanyi kintu kyalengejile mwanamukazhi umo kumutaya pa kazhima?
Kintu ka kimo kyafumine mu kwingijisha bizhima kutama kwa mwanamukazhi umo?
Kumvwa bakazhi amba 'kechi nakonsheshe kwibakwasha ine.' Mwayila jishimikila, ino ñambilo yatala muka?

sub_topics.title: Kunemba - Nembelo ya Nsombelo
competences: Kunemba mutanchi wa bintu bikala mu nembelo ya nsombelo

teacher_steps: Mufunjishi abuule bafunda kuuba amba babena kufunda pa nembelo ya nsombelo
Ebabuule byafwainwa kunembwa nsombelo ne bintu byafwainwa kunembwamo
Bafunda banembe bulongo nsombelo
learner_steps: Kwisamba nembelo ya nsombelo ne bintu byafwainwa kwibikiwamo
Besambe ne kutongola bintu byafwainwa kwikala mu nembelo ya nsombelo (nobe mutwe, ntendekelo, bikomo biji mu byepelo ne Mepuzho)
Banembepo nsombelo imo pa mitwe yapanyiwa
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Bafunda banembe nsombelo pa: 1. Mo kyawamina ne kutamina kwingijisha bizhima kutama, 2. Bantu bonse bafwainwa kwibaswisha kwingijisha bizhima kutama, 3. Muvyala obe umo ye bakashile na mambo a kwingijisha bizhima kutama.

sub_topics.short_notes: Nembelo ya nsombelo yaimena na mutwe, ntendekelo, bikomo biji mu byepelo ne mepuzho.

questions: Nemba nsombelo pa mo kyawamina ne kutamina kwingijisha bizhima kutama
Bantu bonse bafwainwa kwibaswisha kwingijisha bizhima kutama. Pachika
Nemba jishimikila pa muvyala obe umo ye bakashile na mambo a kwingijisha bizhima kutama

sub_topics.title: Mulakazhilo - Bibese bya ñambo
competences: Kusobolola byambo mwayila mitundu ya byambo

teacher_steps: Mufunjishi abuule bafunda bya kusobolola byambo mwayila mitundu yabo
Ebatangijile mu kulumbulula mitundu ya byambo
learner_steps: Kusobolola mitundu ya byambo (bintu, tusuñami, byubilo, ndumbululo, tulumbuluzhi, tununganunga, tutangijilo, ngitabulwilo)
Besambe pa mitundu ya byambo na bimwesho
Basobolole byambo kwesakana na mwayila mitundu yabyo
Bengijishe bibese bya ñambo bimo mu kulenga bipelu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Mitundu ya byambo: 1. Bintu - byambo byaimenako mazhina, 2. Tusuñami - byambo byo twingijisha mu kifulo kya bintu, 3. Byubilo - bimwesha byubilo byubiwa, 4. Ndumbululo - byambo bitukwasha kulumbulula kyubilo, 5. Tulumbuluzhi - byambo byo twingijisha pa kulumbulula kintu, 6. Tununganunga - byambo byo twingijisha kunungakanya milanguluko, 7. Tutangijilo - byambo bitangijila mazhina a bifulo, 8. Ngitabulwilo - byambo byo bingijishiwa pa kuubazhimuka.

sub_topics.short_notes: Byambo byabanyiwa mu bibese byapusana-pusana mwayila maana yabyo ne nshila yakwingijisha.

vocabulary.definition: Byambo byaimenako mazhina a bintu biji nobe kajo, nyama, muntu, mpunzha, mukola, kyalo
Byambo byo twingijisha mu kifulo kya bintu
Bimwesha byubilo byubiwa
Byambo bitukwasha kulumbulula kyubilo, tulumbuluzhi ne ndumbululo ikwabo

questions: Pana bimwesho bya bibese bya byambo
Ingijisha bibese bya ñambo mu kulenga bipelu

sub_topics.title: Ntuntulwilo - Kulumbula byambo bingijishiwa mu kutuntulula

teacher_steps: Isambai pa ndumbulwilo ne buneme buji mu kutuntulula
Bafunda besambe pa byambo byanema bingijishiwa pa kutuntulula
learner_steps: Isambai bulongo pa ndumbulwilo ne buneme buji mu kutuntulula
Besambe bulongo pa byambo byanema bingijishiwa pa kutuntulula
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Byambo bingijishiwa pa kutuntulula: Ntuntulwilo yakunemba, ntuntulwilo ya kwamba, mulaka mufuma byambo bintululwa, mulaka ye mwatuntulwilamo, ntuntulwilo ya byambo kufuma mu mulaka umo kutwala mu milaka yavula.

sub_topics.short_notes: Ntuntulwilo yaimena na byambo byapusana-pusana bingijishiwa mu kutuntulula milaka.

vocabulary.definition: Ntuntulwilo ya byambo, bipelu nangwa bibaaba kufuma mu mulaka umo ne kutwala mu mulaka mukwabo kupichila mu kunemba
Ntuntulwilo ya byambo, bipelu nangwa bibaaba kufuma mu mulaka umo ne kutwala mu mulaka mukwabo kupichila mu kwamba
Ke mulaka mwine mwafuma byambo, bipelu nangwa kibaaba kyatuntululwa
Mulaka mo mwatuntulwila byambo, bipelu, ne bibaba kufuma mu mulaka mukwabo

questions: Pusanya ntuntulwilo yakunemba ne ntuntulwilo ya kwamba

sub_topics.title: Lubesha lwa bonsetu
competences: Kwingijisha lubesha lwa bantu mu myaka yikalenga

teacher_steps: Buule bafunda pa lubesha lwa bantu
Sambilamo pa lupimpu lwa lubesha mu myaka yikalenga
Peezhe bafunda kutangapo byambo bya lubesha
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Lubesha ni lupimpu lwa kyalo ukulaumuna mu butame kabiji ne kwengesha bulongo mu bubeyele bwabene.

sub_topics.short_notes: Mu kino kishina bafunda basakukonsha kwingijisha lubesha lwa bantu mu myaka yikalenga ne kupimizha amba lubesha ni kimwesho kimo kya butame bwa kyalo.

vocabulary.definition: Lupimpu lwa kyalo ukulaumuna mu butame kabiji ne kwengesha bulongo mu bubeyele bwabene
Mwana wa mulume
Mwana wa mukazhi

questions: Samba pa nshila yakwingijisha lubesha bulongo
Peezhamo pa buyuke bwa lubesha mu kyalo

sub_topics.title: Luusa lwa bantu
competences: Kwingijisha luusa lwa panyiwa ku bantu

teacher_steps: Buule bafunda pa luusa lwa panyiwa ku bantu
Sambilamo pa buyuke bwa luusa
Peezhe bafunda kutanga byambo bya luusa
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Luusa ni lubesha lwa kyalo ne lutobolo lwa bantu.

sub_topics.short_notes: Mu kino kishina bafunda basakuyuka buyuke bwa luusa lwa panyiwa ku bantu ne nshila yakwingijisha luusa bulongo mu kyalo.

vocabulary.definition: Lubesha lwa kyalo ne lutobolo lwa bantu

sub_topics.title: Buneme bwa bisho

teacher_steps: Buule bafunda pa buneme bwa bisho
Sambilamo pa nshila ya kwingijisha buneme
Peezhe bafunda kutanga byambo bya buneme
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Buneme ni nshila ya kulongolola bisho ne kupesapesha bintu.

sub_topics.short_notes: Mu kino kishina bafunda basakuyuka buneme bwa bisho ne nshila ya kwingijisha buneme bulongo.

vocabulary.definition: Nshila ya kulongolola bisho ne kupesapesha bintu

sub_topics.title: Mazhikakanwa

teacher_steps: Buule bafunda pa mazhikakanwa
Sambilamo pa nshila ya mazhikakanwa
Peezhe bafunda kutanga mazhikakanwa
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Mazhikakanwa ni byambo byakwingijisha mu kulongolola bintu.

sub_topics.short_notes: Mu kino kishina bafunda basakuyuka mazhikakanwa ne nshila yakwingijisha mazhikakanwa mu kulongolola.

vocabulary.definition: Byambo byakwingijisha mu kulongolola bintu

sub_topics.title: Mashimikila

teacher_steps: Buule bafunda pa mashimikila
Sambilamo pa nshila ya mashimikila
Peezhe bafunda kutanga mashimikila
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Mashimikila ni byambo byakwingijisha mu kwishimikila.

sub_topics.short_notes: Mu kino kishina bafunda basakuyuka mashimikila ne nshila yakwingijisha mashimikila bulongo.

vocabulary.definition: Byambo byakwingijisha mu kwishimikila

sub_topics.title: Lupimpu lwa lubesha

teacher_steps: Buule bafunda pa lupimpu lwa lubesha
Sambilamo pa nshila ya lupimpu
Peezhe bafunda kutanga lupimpu lwa lubesha
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Lupimpu lwa lubesha ni nshila ya kwingijisha lubesha mu kyalo.

sub_topics.short_notes: Mu kino kishina bafunda basakuyuka lupimpu lwa lubesha ne nshila yakwingijisha lupimpu bulongo.

vocabulary.definition: Nshila ya kwingijisha bintu mu kyalo
